deterministic_checks.selection: resname BNZ and not element H

task_intent: Ligand-preparation test: build an MD-ready system from PDB 181L while preserving the benzene crystal pose in the T4 lysozyme L99A cavity. After clean / parameterize / build / minimize, write the final benzene heavy-atom RMSD against input/ligand_reference.pdb into metrics.preparation.ligand_heavy_atom_rmsd_angstrom; the scorer recomputes the same RMSD with mdtraj and checks agreement within 0.05 Å.

references.note: Morton et al. 1995 — internal cavity benzene binding to T4L L99A.
Eriksson et al. 1992 — L99A cavity-creating mutation context.
